title: SO(10) emergence via BCC defect bundle on CP2
statement: The BCC defect bundle on $\mathbb{CP}^2$ realises SO(10) emergence: Cech cocycle closure $g_{01}g_{12}g_{20}=I$ with three-patch verification $c_1=1$ (legacy Math162 + Math167), as a conditional theorem.
scope: Conditional on the constructed bundle data; gauge-group emergence (sub-task 2) is NOT included.
falsifier: Failure of cocycle closure or of the c_1 computation on re-verification.
no_overclaim: Full gauge-group emergence (sub-task 2 stands at T3 after the Math245 rollback).
next_action: M1-migrate Math162/167 and re-verify the cocycle computation as a package.
